features: HYDRA LIPSTICK: Oulac 3d moisturizing lipstick is infused with meadowfoam seed oil, Shea butter & damask rose oil, nourishing your lips like a lip balm for long-lasting hydration
SMOOTH & SHINY: Enriched with 90% moisture emollients, this glossy tinted lipstick creates an effortless sweep of lip colour and glass-like high shine finish
EASY FUNNY APPLICATION: Oulac moisture shine lipstick can be used alone as tinted lipstick or layered with other lipsticks to increase the gloss of lip makeup
VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE: Oulac lipsticks have been certified and approved by PETA. The product is 100% vegan and has never tested on animals, as well as gluten-free
TRAVEL-FRIENDLY LIPSTICK: With the designed compact lipstick case, it can be carried in your clutch bag to touch up your make-up anytime, anywhere
description: Product Description Creamy Texture Effortless sweep of colour and a luminous shine finish Soft creamy texture delivers excellent spreadability and buildable, even coverage. (10) Learn More Next page What type of lipstick is this? Oulac Moisture Shine Lipstick is a 2-in-1 tinted lipstick & lip balm, it is not only offers a natural lip colour, but also moisten lips like a lip balm. Is this lipstick easy to remove? It is very easy to remove by any makeup remover. How can this lipstick moisten lips? Infused with meadowfoam seed oil, shea butter & damask rose oil, Oulac Moisture Shine Lipstick keeps your lips away from dryness, cracked, dead skin and create the perfect healthy lip makeup. What's about the coverage level of this hydra lipstick? Oulac 3d hydra lipstick is a sheer medium coverage lipstick, most of the shades are natural for all skin tones.
